contextprompt
How it works Features Pricing FAQ Blog Support Get Started Free

Meetings decide what to build.
contextprompt turns talk into AI-ready tasks.

Paste a Zoom, Google Meet, Slack, or Teams link. The contextprompt bot joins your call, records and transcribes, then scans your repos and extracts structured coding tasks. Hand the output to any AI assistant and ship.

Get started free

No API keys needed. Free plan includes 1 hour/month.

Monday, March 14, 2026
23m 3 tasks 2 speakers completed
T1: Replace session tokens with JWT
ready high confidence

Swap express-session auth for JWT in the middleware layer

src/middleware/auth.ts src/types/session.ts
Steps:
1. Remove express-session dependency from auth middleware
2. Add JWT sign/verify with jsonwebtoken
3. Update session.ts types to JWTPayload interface
T2: Add token refresh endpoint
review medium confidence

Create POST /auth/refresh for token renewal

src/routes/auth.ts
Zoom, Google Meet, Slack & Teams · No API keys needed · Free plan included · 12 languages supported

See the difference

Same meeting. Two very different outcomes.

0:00
Current Process
contextprompt

How it works

No installs, no audio drivers, no API keys. Just paste a meeting link.

1

Connect your repos

Sign in with Google, then add your repos. contextprompt scans file paths, exports, and types.

~/projects/web-app 142 files · 38 exports
~/projects/auth-service 67 files · 21 exports
2

Paste a meeting link

contextprompt bot joined

Alice The auth middleware needs JWT...

Bob Which files are we talking about?

Alice Mainly auth.ts and the session types.

Bob Got it. What about the refresh flow?

3

Get structured tasks

T1: Replace session tokens with JWT high confidence

src/middleware/auth.ts, src/types/session.ts

1. Remove express-session from middleware 2. Add JWT sign/verify with jsonwebtoken
T2: Add token refresh endpoint medium confidence

src/routes/auth.ts

Hand tasks to your AI tool

One-click copy. Paste into any AI coding assistant.

$ claude "Implement T1: Replace session tokens
  with JWT in src/middleware/auth.ts and
  src/types/session.ts per the plan"

Built for engineering teams

Zoom, Meet, Slack & Teams

The contextprompt bot joins your call like any other participant. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, Slack, and Microsoft Teams.

Repo-aware extraction

Scans your codebase for file paths, exports, function signatures, and types so tasks reference real code, not guesses.

One-click copy

Copy any task with full context — steps, file paths, and transcript evidence — ready to paste into your AI coding tool.

GitHub issue integration

Analyze open issues against your repo structure and get implementation plans with file paths and steps.

Direct AI integration

Output is structured for any AI coding tool. Implementation steps, file paths, and transcript evidence included.

12 languages

Transcription and task extraction in 12 languages. Your team speaks their language, contextprompt extracts the tasks.

The meeting-to-code gap

No product does this today. Meeting tools don't understand code. Coding agents don't attend meetings. contextprompt does both.

"What exactly did they want changed?"

You replay 47 minutes of the call to find the 90 seconds that matter.

Every task includes the exact transcript quote that prompted it, attributed to the speaker.

"Which files does this touch?"

Someone said "the calendar component." Good luck mapping that to actual file paths.

contextprompt scans your connected repos and maps tasks to real files with confidence levels.

"How do I phrase this for Claude?"

You spend 15 minutes writing a prompt from memory, guessing at file paths.

Each task comes with implementation steps you can paste directly into Claude Code.

Simple pricing

No API keys needed. Everything is included — recording, transcription, and task extraction.

$0

  • 1 hour/month of meeting recording
  • Repo-aware task extraction
  • All meeting platforms
  • AI-powered analysis
  • Dashboard access

  • 15 hours/month of meeting recording
  • Everything in Free

  • Multi-language support
